extortion.description: [AI generated] Cristália - Indústria Farmacêutica is a premier pharmaceutical company based in Brazil. Founded in 1972, it is renowned for contributing to major advancements in the medical and pharmaceutical field. The company produces medicines, hospital products, and active pharmaceutical ingredients. Cristália stands out in the industry with over 200 patents and specializes in various therapeutic classes, including psychiatry, anesthesia, and oncology.
